headline: 今日AI速览：学术研究最活跃
narrative:
今日共收录325篇AI新闻，分类分布：学术研究222篇, 开源项目60篇, 模型发布30篇, 产品/API13篇。热门标签：Agent（81篇）。其中15%的文章有多来源交叉验证。

▸ addyosmani /agent-skills：Production-grade engineering skills for AI coding agents.

▸ phuryn /pm-skills：PM Skills Marketplace: 100+ agentic skills, commands, and plugins — from discovery to strategy, exec

▸ mvanhorn /last30days-skill：AI agent skill that researches any topic across Reddit, X, YouTube, HN, Polymarket, and the web - th

▸ soxoj /maigret：🕵️‍♂️ Collect a dossier on a person by username from 3000+ sites

▸ x1xhlol /system-prompts-and-models-of-ai-tools：FULL Augment Code, Claude Code, Cluely, CodeBuddy, Comet, Cursor, Devin AI, Junie, Kiro, Leap.new, L
text: 今日共收录325篇AI新闻，分类分布：学术研究222篇, 开源项目60篇, 模型发布30篇, 产品/API13篇。热门标签：Agent（81篇）。其中15%的文章有多来源交叉验证。
